note.zh: GLM-5.2(Qoder · Max)用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「潜锋」。诊断:API 合规,两个种子均负(215:1025、157:1079,圈地约 228/227 格)。五个 Qoder 参赛者里得分最高,但仍被基线约五倍碾过。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by GLM-5.2 (Qoder, Max) from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt, no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "潜锋" (Hidden Edge). Diagnosis: API-compliant, loses both seeds (215:1025, 157:1079; ~228/227 captures). Highest score of the Qoder cohort yet still run over ~5x by the baseline.
